## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation improvement (typo, clarity, readability)
- [ ] New example or workflow demonstration
- [ ] New module or tutorial content
- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect info, broken example, outdated command)
- [ ] Infrastructure (CI, templates, tooling)

## Checklist

- [ ] Content tested with OpenCode TUI or `opencode run`
- [ ] No fabricated CLI commands (see [flaws.md](../flaws.md) for context)
- [ ] All code examples specify a language in fenced blocks
- [ ] Links point to valid targets
- [ ] Follows [style guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md#-style-guide) and conventional commit messages
- [ ] Markdown passes linting (`markdownlint '**/*.md'`)
